info.name: FastShop Complete Backend API - ALL 400+ Endpoints
info.description: Complete API collection for ALL backend features with auto-save tokens and base URL for Admin, Manager, Seller, and Customer roles. Covers all 38 route files with 400+ endpoints across all phases (1-6).

item.name: 00. Authentication
item.description: Register and login for all user roles: Customer, Seller, Manager, Admin. Includes password reset and token refresh.

item.name: 01. Users
item.description: User profile and admin user management

item.name: 03. Products
item.description: Product browsing, search, seller management, and manager approval
